entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan L. Millsp., the primary crop studied for nodule damage and yield loss

entities.name: RIVELLIA ANGULATA
entities.description: A pest whose larvae cause damage to the root nodules of pigeonpea

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil where nodule damage in pigeonpea was found to be more severe

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil where nodule damage in pigeonpea was less severe compared to Vertisols

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research facility in India where the field observations were made

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The overall development and physical increase of the pigeonpea plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity and seed output of the pigeonpea

entities.name: SOIL INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents applied to the soil to control pests, which in this study adversely affected crop growth

entities.name: ALDRIN
entities.description: A specific soil insecticide used in attempts to control Rivellia angulata

entities.name: HEXACHLOROCYCLOHEXANE
entities.description: A specific soil insecticide used in attempts to control Rivellia angulata

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorgorum bicolor L. Moench, a subsequent crop adversely affected by soil insecticides

entities.name: NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: The process by which the plant absorbs essential nutrients from the soil

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: A controlled environment used to successfully study the impact of nodule damage

entities.name: N LEVELS
entities.description: Different concentrations of nitrogen used as a variable in the pot study

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of intentionally introducing Rivellia sp. to plants in a pot study

entities.name: NODULE DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the root nodules after drying, used as a measure of damage

entities.name: ACETYLENE REDUCTION ACTIVITY
entities.description: A biochemical measure used to quantify the rate of N2-fixation

entities.name: TOTAL LEAF AREA
entities.description: The cumulative surface area of the plant's leaves

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the leaves of the plant

entities.name: SHOOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the above-ground plant parts after drying

entities.name: TOP DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the upper portion of the plant at maturity

entities.name: ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the root system after drying

entities.name: SEED DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the produced seeds after drying

entities.name: TOTAL N UPTAKE
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant

entities.name: P UPTAKE
entities.description: The total amount of phosphorus absorbed by the plant

entities.name: N2-FIXATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form by root nodules

entities.name: NODULE DAMAGE
entities.description: The destruction of root nodules caused by Rivellia angulata larvae
